events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need parse scenario. Field service, VFDs & motor controls, observed condition: missing load reactor on long motor leads. Work rough-complete. Need identify component/condition and visible defect cues. Decision: fail because non-compliant? Missing load reactor on long motor leads can cause motor insulation damage/reflected wave; NEC 430 maybe manufacturer instructions require it. Component condition installed-defective. Risk high? Could cause motor failure, VFD damage, downtime. percent_complete maybe 80. confidence high. findings: no load reactor installed at motor/VFD output for long cable run; excessive dV/dt/reflected wave risk. actions: install properly sized load reactor/dV/dt filter per OEM manual at VFD output; verify cable length and motor insulation rating. references: NEC 430.122? Actually NEC 430 covers motors. Manufacturer manuals. Need include component_conditions installed-defective, non-compliant. decision fail. risk high. work_stage rough-complete. percent_complete 80. value 0. sound_source etc default empty string/0. order empty. workable empty.
